topIssues: Frame 5, 6, 9: Formulas in the '+10 more model cells' summary row are truncated with ellipses (e.g., 'Historical Da...'), hiding the actual code being written.

Frame 10: F73 / revolver balance suddenly updates to '=E73+F44' and '✓ V2', but the status bar at the bottom only mentions writing 'F80'. This mismatch makes it hard to track when F73 was actually processed.
fixSuggestions: Adjust the font size or column width in the '+10 more model cells' row to prevent formula truncation, or use a horizontal scroll/fade effect to show the full formula.
Add an explicit step/frame for writing F73, or update the status bar text in Frame 10 to reflect that multiple cells (F73 and F80) are being written simultaneously.
